mapper.insert: INSERT INTO laws (country_id, title, article_number, content, law_vector, updated_at) VALUES (#{countryId}, #{title}, #{articleNumber}, #{content}, #{lawVector}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT law_id, country_id, title, article_number, content, law_vector, updated_at FROM laws
SELECT law_id, country_id, title, article_number, content, law_vector, updated_at FROM laws WHERE country_id = #{countryId}
